project_area: Economic recovery, technical assistance to small businesses, administration of new business grants, entrepreneurial training
demographic_requirements: Open to all eligible businesses in Somerset and Kennebec County, with a focus on early-stage and innovation-based businesses
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include early-stage businesses and entrepreneurs in Somerset and Kennebec County, Maine. The program specifically targets technology and innovation-based businesses but is open to all eligible businesses in the designated counties.
